summary.notes: All 4,024 unique keywords from Project Gorgon's items.json have been categorized into 19 logical meta-categories. Each keyword belongs to exactly one category. The two largest categories are Food & Cooking Ingredients (1,607) and Treasure/Loot/Quest Items (1,234), which together represent 63% of all keywords.
